prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河海大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约9496名→9620名→10565名→13085名→12291名，整体呈后移趋势，2024年达到近年最大位次13085名后，2025年小幅回升至12291名，近5年累计后移约2795名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年22人、2022年26人、2023年26人、2024年30人、2025年30人，2026年增至32人，较2025年扩招2人（增幅约6.7%），扩招对竞争有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65名区间，属于中上水平211高校，水利工程为全国顶尖学科；河海大学在近年声誉舆情中未见明显负面事件，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第52位，评价为"较热"，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，对报考关注度有一定正向作用；无投档断档记录；水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程获评A，环境科学与工程获评A，三个A类学科与该校水利水电工程、港口航道与海岸工程、水文与水资源工程、环境相关专业高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等专业社会热度持续偏高，与河海大学在沪招生专业（电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、物联网工程等）高度匹配，热门专业吸引力增强；上海市2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年的49276人增幅约35.4%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12291名、2026年招生计划扩招2人（缓解竞争）、上海市考生总数大幅增加约35.4%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉平稳且抖音热度中等偏上、热门工科专业持续受追捧等因素，竞争加剧效应大于扩招缓解效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约12703名，区间12203–13203名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术
- 水利水电工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能科学与技术
- 机器人工程
- 物联网工程
- 水文与水资源工程
- 港口航道与海岸工程
- 船舶与海洋工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 金融工程
- 信息管理与信息系统
- 人力资源管理
- 英语。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12203–13203名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如12200名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如13000名以外）建议以二档工科专业为主，三档专业作为稳妥选择。河海大学水利类王牌专业（水利水电工程、港口航道与海岸工程）学科实力顶尖但行业热度平稳，适合对水利行业有明确兴趣的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hohai University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 9496 → 9620 → 10565 → 13085 → 12291, showing an overall backward trend. After reaching a recent peak of 13085 in 2024, it slightly recovered to 12291 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2795 over the past 5 years. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shanghai was 22 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 30 in 2025, and will increase to 32 in 2026, an expansion of 2 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 6.7%), which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 63rd, with recent rankings stable in the 60–65 range, placing it among mid-to-high level 211 universities. Its water conservancy engineering is a top national discipline. In recent years, there have been no significant negative incidents in reputation and public opinion, and the university's reputation remains stable. Its Douyin popularity ranks 52nd, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, which has a positive effect on application attention. There is no record of admission gaps. Water conservancy engineering is rated A+ (top nationally), civil engineering is rated A, and environmental science and engineering is rated A. These three A-level disciplines closely correspond to the university's majors such as water conservancy and hydropower engineering, port waterway and coastal engineering, hydrology and water resources engineering, and environment-related majors, strongly attracting applicants to these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as electrical engineering and automation (highly recommended), computer science (recommended), and electronic information/communication (highly recommended) continue to have high social popularity, which highly matches the majors offered by Hohai University in Shanghai (electrical engineering and automation, computer science and technology, intelligent science and technology, internet of things engineering, etc.), enhancing the appeal of popular majors. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12291, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 2 students (alleviating competition), the significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of candidates in Shanghai (intensifying competition), the stable university reputation with moderate to high Douyin popularity, and the continued pursuit of popular engineering majors, the intensifying effect of competition outweighs the alleviating effect of expansion. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 12703, with a range of 12203–13203.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Water Conservancy and Hydropower Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Robotics Engineering
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering
- Port Waterway and Coastal Engineering
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Financial Engineering
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Human Resource Management
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 12203–13203, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12200), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 13000), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 engineering majors, with Tier 3 majors as stable choices. Hohai University's flagship water conservancy majors (Water Conservancy and Hydropower Engineering, Port Waterway and Coastal Engineering) have top-tier academic strength but stable industry popularity, suitable for candidates with a clear interest in the water conservancy industry.
